scripts.dev:admin: npm run build:contracts && npm run dev --workspace apps/admin
scripts.build:client: npm run build:contracts && npm run build --workspace apps/client
scripts.build:admin: npm run build:contracts && npm run build --workspace apps/admin
scripts.build: npm run build:contracts && npm run build --workspace apps/client && npm run build --workspace apps/admin
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:contracts && npm run typecheck:client && npm run typecheck:admin
